true_intent: Approve or reject the following cross-domain initiative: the C-10 Integration proposals staged in trail ceo/4cf2171d-4600-46a8-84bf-93939bc26aaa. Human replied bare '/ceo:approve-initiative' with no explicit resolution of the item-1 (.clinerules) flag raised in that trail's disposition, which specifically asked for explicit confirmation before building anything there. Scope of this approval: apply proposal-2 (CLAUDE.md) and proposal-3 (AGENTS.md Startup Protocol diff) only. Proposal-1 (.clinerules) is NOT approved by this cycle -- treating a bare command as approval of a flagged, not-recommended item would be assuming consent that wasn't given; it remains open pending an explicit answer.
